texts.orig: Most membranes are not suitable for use in organic solvents, acids and alkaline solutions
texts.text: Most membranes are not suitable for use in organic solvents, acids and alkaline solutions

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Existing chemical-resistant membranes still have limitations that prevents widespread adoption
texts.text: Existing chemical-resistant membranes still have limitations that prevents widespread adoption

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Improving chemical-resistance using chemical agent to crosslink the membrane polymers
texts.text: Improving chemical-resistance using chemical agent to crosslink the membrane polymers

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Crosslinks are not temperaturestable and breaks when the temperature is increased
texts.text: Crosslinks are not temperaturestable and breaks when the temperature is increased

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Non-crosslinked membranes are susceptible to swelling and dissolution when exposed to strong solvents
texts.text: Non-crosslinked membranes are susceptible to swelling and dissolution when exposed to strong solvents

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Crosslinked membranes have better chemical resistance by constraining swelling by solvent molecules
texts.text: Crosslinked membranes have better chemical resistance by constraining swelling by solvent molecules

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Crosslinks may break and membranes become unusable when exposed to elevated process temperature
texts.text: Crosslinks may break and membranes become unusable when exposed to elevated process temperature

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A more robust membrane technology that is both chemical-resistant and thermal-stable is needed for industrial applications involving organic solvents, acids and alkaline solutions
texts.text: A more robust membrane technology that is both chemical-resistant and thermal-stable is needed for industrial applications involving organic solvents, acids and alkaline solutions
